headline: 3 Equal Weight ETFs Beating the S&P 500 in 2026 as Mega-Cap Dominance Fades
summary: The S&P 500 you own through a standard index fund is not as diversified as it looks. The cap-weighted version of the index hands roughly a third of your money to a handful of mega-cap technology names, meaning five or six companies effectively drive your returns. headline: BAE Systems and U.S. Department of War sign agreement to quadruple THAAD seeker production
summary: BAE Systems (LON: BA) has signed a landmark seven-year framework agreement with the Department of War (DoW) to quadruple production capacity and accelerate delivery of the infrared seeker for the Terminal High Altitude Area Defense (THAAD) interceptor missile in support of Lockheed Martin Corporation. The THAAD seeker provides critical sensing and guidance capabilities to help protect the United States and its global allies from ballistic missiles.

raw.headline: BAE Systems and U.S. Department of War sign agreement to quadruple THAAD seeker production
raw.summary: BAE Systems (LON: BA) has signed a landmark seven-year framework agreement with the Department of War (DoW) to quadruple production capacity and accelerate delivery of the infrared seeker for the Terminal High Altitude Area Defense (THAAD) interceptor missile in support of Lockheed Martin Corporation. The THAAD seeker provides critical sensing and guidance capabilities to help protect the United States and its global allies from ballistic missiles.

headline: FAA Move Puts Boeing 777 9 Closer To Cash Flow Test
summary: US Federal Aviation Administration allows Boeing’s 777-9 to enter the fourth and final phase of certification. This move clears an important hurdle for the first aircraft in Boeing’s long delayed 777X family. Certification progress comes as Boeing’s widebody program faces scrutiny after execution delays and contract adjustments. For investors watching Boeing (NYSE:BA), the certification progress arrives after a mixed period for the stock. Shares recently closed at $196.42, with a 7.6% gain...
